betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Energy Barriers: The Shield System§f

§aConstruct customizable forcefields to protect your base and kill invading mobs!§f

Defending your base with walls is outdated. The RFTools §bShield Projector§f allows you to create dynamic, programmable energy shields of any shape.

§6Shield Infrastructure§f:
§b• Shield Projector (Tiers 1-4)§f: The core controller. Stores up to §e200,000 RF§f, receiving §e5,000 RF/tick§f.
§b• Shield Templates§f: Blocks placed in the world to define the shape and volume of the forcefield. Once dialed, the projector replaces templates with energy blocks.
§b• Size Limits§f: A Tier 1 Projector supports a maximum forcefield size of §e256 blocks§f. High tiers support vastly larger volumes.

§6Forcefield Modes & Filters§f:
§9Right-click§f the projector to configure your shield. You can set the blocks to be:
§b• Pass/Block Filters§f: Set rules to block or allow passage for §ePlayers§f, §eHostiles§f, §ePassives§f, or §eAll Entities§f.
§b• Camouflage (Camo)§f: Mimic the texture of any solid block, or set the shield to be §ecompletely invisible§f.
§b• Solid/Liquid§f: Toggle whether the shield blocks movement or allows players to walk through it.

§6Energy Costs & Damage§f:
Maintaining a forcefield draws constant power, and active defense drains it rapidly:
§b• Base Maintenance§f: §e8 RF/tick§f for every 10 blocks of active shield.
§b• Shield Mode Add-on§f: §e+2 RF/tick§f per 10 blocks.
§b• Camo Mode Add-on§f: §e+2 RF/tick§f per 10 blocks.
§b• Damage Spikes§f: You can set the shield to damage invading hostiles (deals §c5.0 damage / 2.5 hearts§f per contact):
  §e• Damage Mob§f: Consumes §e1,000 RF§f per hit.
  §e• Damage Player§f: Consumes §e2,000 RF§f per hit.
§b• Looting Bonus§f: Killing mobs with shield damage grants a §aLooting III bonus§f and yields §e2 Dimensional Shards§f per looting kill.
